format: provisional MPC3000 SND v2, mono signed 16-bit little-endian payload

segments.description: Literal full-scale negative anchor for MPC60 normalization.

segments.name: positive_full_scale_anchor

segments.name: all_12bit_left_justified_long_plateaus
segments.description: All signed 12-bit values left-justified into 16-bit PCM, each repeated 96 times. Use late plateau interiors to avoid transition/filter effects.
